title: Giant Snake target can roll to end effect

card.rawText: When this creature hits, the targeted creature cannot inflict Atk damage. Once per turn, they may roll 1 die. If the result is 3-6, this effect ends.

plan.title: Giant Snake target can roll to end effect
plan.summary: Once per turn, verify the affected creature may roll 3-6 to end Giant Snake status.

notes: Target is affected by Giant Snake and rolls 5 to end the status.
